name: Grapefruit or Orange Peel, Candied
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut peel into strips.
2. Bring the strips to a boil in plenty of water, discarding the water and starting fresh each time (repeat this process 5 times).
3. Measure the peel; for each cup, add 1/2 cup sugar and 1/4 cup water.
4. Boil the strip pieces in the syrup until dry.
5. Roll each piece in granulated sugar.
6. Place the candied peels on a cookie sheet to dry.
7. Store in an airtight container to prevent drying out.
